chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْوُقُوفِ عَلَى الصَّفَا وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 141 – The pausing upon Al Safa and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/68)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/68)
text: حَدَّثَنِي جَمِيلٌ قَالَ قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) هَلْ مِنْ دُعَاءٍ مُوَقَّتٍ أَقُولُهُ عَلَى الصَّفَا وَ الْمَرْوَةِ فَقَالَ تَقُولُ إِذَا وَقَفْتَ عَلَى الصَّفَا لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَ يُمِيتُ وَ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ قَدِيرٌ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ .
لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَ لَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَ يُمِيتُ وَ هُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ قَدِيرٌ

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Yaqoub Bin Shuayb who said, ‘Jameel narrated to me saying,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Is there any from a prescribed supplication which I should be saying upon Al-Safa and Al-Marwa?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘You should be saying when you pause upon Al-Safa:

‘There is no god except for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Alone, there being no associates for him. For Him<sup>azwj</sup> is the Kingdom, and for Him<sup>azwj</sup> is the Praise. He<sup>azwj</sup> Revives and He<sup>azwj</sup> Causes to die, and He<sup>azwj</sup> is Able upon everything – three times.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Safwan ibn Yahya from Ya’qub ibn Shu’ayb who has said the following: “Jamil narrated to me saying, ‘I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, “Is there a prayer of a particular timing that I should say at al-Safa’ and al-Marwah?” He (the Imam) replied, say, “No one other than Allah, who is One and has no partners, deserves worship. To Him belong the kingdom and all praise. He gives life and causes things to die and has power over all things - three times.’””
